title: Snowbound
description: Embark on a winter survival journey, navigating icy landscapes and enduring harsh temperatures. Can you beat the challenges of the frozen wilderness?
body:
Snowbound is a fork of macaroni0423's [Frozen Land Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/frozen-land), building upon its foundation with additional tweaks and fixes.

# Features
**- Early-Game Adjustments** - Dying early on in an attempt to make a base can be very punishing and frustrating, especially for new players. Upon spawning, you are now placed in a village and equipped with leather boots.\
**- Player Graves + Recall Mirror** - These additions have been implemented as a way to cut down on item loss.\
**- More Structures** - Giving each dimension more flair\
**- Combat Balancing** - Bamboo Spears were causing a lot of issues as they were easily the strongest and cheapest weapon in the game. And thus, they are not present in this version (along with some other weapons).\
**- Performance + Stability Improvements** - Unused mods have been removed and some new ones have been added to further boost the performance.\
**- General Fixes** -  Day/Night Cycles are functional now; torches no longer kill you in crammed areas + other small things.\
**- And more!**

# ❗Migrating from Frozen Land❗
***Please note that if you decide to switch to my version of the modpack, you may lose some of your items (albeit nothing too important). Proceed at your own risk.***
